## TDD Evidence (Required)

- [ ] I wrote/updated a failing test before implementation (Red).
- [ ] I ran the failing test and confirmed expected failure.
- [ ] I implemented the minimal code to pass (Green).
- [ ] I refactored while keeping tests green (Refactor).
